hmong.barry_harris_1929_2021_codified_bebop_: Barry Harris (1929-2021) tau tsim cov cai rau bebop harmony. Nws txoj kev siv 6th chords es tsis yog 7ths thiab ntxiv diminished passing chords ntawm cov scale degrees kom lub suab mus tau du.
hmong.attack_time_to_reach_full_volume_decay: Attack: lub sijhawm mus txog full volume. Decay: lub sijhawm poob mus rau sustain. Sustain: theem volume uas tuav. Release: lub sijhawm ploj mus tom qab tso lub key.
hmong.a_scale_is_an_ordered_set_of_pitches_m: Ib qho scale yog ib pawg pitches uas muaj kev txiav. Cov modes yog cov rotations ntawm scale uas pib ntawm cov degrees sib txawv. Txhua qho tsim ib qho mood txawv.
hmong.chords_are_built_by_stacking_intervals: Cov chords raug tsim los ntawm kev tsub cov intervals (3rds). Major siv ib qho major 3rd + minor 3rd. Minor rov qab lawv. Extended chords ntxiv 7ths, 9ths, thiab ntau dua.
hmong.kicks_use_a_sine_oscillator_with_a_pit: Cov kicks siv ib qho sine oscillator nrog pitch sweep. Cov snares sib xyaw noise (filtered) + tone body. Cov hi-hats siv high-pass filtered noise bursts.
hmong.4_4_4_quarter_note_beats_per_bar_most_: 4/4 = 4 quarter-note beats hauv ib bar (feem ntau tshaj). 3/4 = waltz feel. 6/8 = compound duple. 5/4 thiab 7/8 tsim cov grooves asymmetric, txawv.
hmong.keys_arranged_by_ascending_5ths_clockw: Cov keys raug teeb raws ascending 5ths clockwise. Cov keys sib ze muaj 6 ntawm 7 nqe zoo ib yam. Mus clockwise ntxiv sharps; counter-clockwise ntxiv flats.
hmong.every_musical_sound_contains_overtones: Txhua lub suab nkauj muaj overtones saum lub fundamental. Lawv lub zog sib piv txiav txim rau timbre — vim li cas trumpet thiaj nrov txawv ntawm flute ntawm tib lub pitch.
hmong.an_interval_is_the_distance_between_tw: Ib qho interval yog qhov deb ntawm ob pitches, ntsuas hauv semitones. Frequency ratio txiav txim rau consonance (cov ratios yooj yim li 3:2 nrov du).
hmong.plays_chord_notes_one_at_a_time_in_seq: Ntaus cov chord notes ib qho zuj zus raws sequence. Up = qis mus siab, Down = siab mus qis. Tsim cov patterns ntws los ntawm cov chords nres.
hmong.a_filter_removes_frequencies_above_low: Ib qho filter tshem cov frequencies saum (lowpass), hauv qab (highpass), lossis ib puag ncig (bandpass) ib qho cutoff frequency. Resonance (Q) txhaws cov frequencies ze rau cutoff, tsim ib qho peak.
hmong.tremolo_periodic_volume_changes_amplit: Tremolo: kev hloov volume raws sijhawm (amplitude modulation). Vibrato: kev hloov pitch raws sijhawm (frequency modulation). Ob qho tswj los ntawm LFO (Low Frequency Oscillator).
hmong.discovered_in_1983_a_noise_burst_feeds: Pom hauv 1983. Ib qho noise burst nkag mus rau ib txoj delay line luv nrog feedback. Delay time txiav txim rau pitch. Ib qho filter hauv feedback loop tswj brightness thiab decay. Ua raws li plucked strings ntxhias.
hmong.the_sequencer_is_a_composition_tool_ea: Sequencer yog ib qho composition tool. Txhua step sawv cev rau ib qho beat subdivision. Melody row teeb cov pitched notes, drums ntxiv rhythm. Musical notation qhia qhov koj tsim.
hmong.notes_on_lines_and_spaces_represent_pi: Cov notes ntawm cov kab thiab qhov chaw sawv cev rau pitches. Duration qhia los ntawm note shape: whole (○), half (𝅗𝅥), quarter (♩), eighth (♪). Staff siv 5 kab.
hmong.try_to_match_this_pattern: Sim ua kom phim lub pattern no!
hmong.equal_temperament_12_notes_per_octave_: Equal temperament: 12 notes hauv ib octave, ratio 2^(1/12). A4 = 440 Hz; A5 = 880 Hz. Bach's Well-Tempered Clavier (1722) tau yaum ntiaj teb rau qhov compromise no. Txhua note koj ntaus ntawm no nyob ntawm daim grid ntawd.
hmong.major_w_w_h_w_w_w_h_minor_w_h_w_w_h_w_: Major: W-W-H-W-W-W-H. Minor: W-H-W-W-H-W-W. Cov 7 modes (Ionian, Dorian, Phrygian, Lydian, Mixolydian, Aeolian, Locrian) los ntawm kev tig lub interval pattern ntawm major scale.
hmong.triads_root_third_fifth_major_4_3_semi: Triads: root + third + fifth. Major (4+3 semitones), minor (3+4), diminished (3+3), augmented (4+4). 7th chords ntxiv ib qho third ntxiv. Pop music = ~6 chords rov qab; jazz siv extensions thiab substitutions.
hmong.sustained_chord_textures_the_bed_under: Sustained chord textures — lub txaj hauv qab yuav luag txhua cinematic score. Sim iv-V-i hauv minor, lossis i-VI-VII rau Hans Zimmer feel ntawd. Cov drones hauv fifths txhawb Indian classical music thiab bagpipe traditions.
hmong.most_popular_music_sits_at_4_4_90_130_: Feem ntau popular music nyob ntawm 4/4, 90-130 BPM. Hip-hop ~85-95, house 120-130, drum-and-bass ~170 (half-time feel). Kick ntawm 1+3, snare ntawm 2+4 = backbeat — lub hauv paus ntawm rock + pop.
hmong.theory_the_math_behind_the_sound: Theory — cov lej tom qab lub suab
hmong.pythagoras_500_bce_discovered_consonan: Pythagoras (~500 BCE) pom consonance los ntawm integer frequency ratios: octave 2:1, fifth 3:2, fourth 4:3. Helmholtz txuas ntxiv rau xyoo 1862. Suab = compression waves; music = cov patterns uas peb pom zoo hu ua zoo nkauj.
hmong.full_chord_grid_strum_plate_and_voice_: Full chord grid, strum plate, thiab voice presets
hmong.drag_across_strings_to_strum: Rub hla cov strings kom strum!
hmong.frequency_modulation_fm_synthesis_uses: Frequency Modulation (FM) synthesis siv ib qho oscillator (modulator) los hloov frequency ntawm lwm qhov (carrier) sai sai. Modulator:carrier ratio txiav txim rau harmonic content. Cov ratios yooj yim (1:1, 2:1, 3:1) tsim harmonic tones. Cov ratios nyuaj tsim metallic, bell-like, lossis inharmonic sounds. FM tau nrov los ntawm Yamaha DX7 hauv 1983.
hmong.supersaw_stacks_multiple_sawtooth_osci: SuperSaw tsub ntau sawtooth oscillators detuned me ntsis ntawm ib leeg. Qhov no tsim ib lub suab loj, dav, ci — lub cim ntawm EDM, trance, thiab modern pop. Ntau voices = suab tuab tab sis siv ntau CPU. Detuning tswj seb cov voices tuned deb npaum li cas — detune ntau = dav/chorus-like ntau, tsawg = nyias/focused ntau.
hmong.an_arpeggiator_plays_the_notes_of_a_ch: 🔬 Ib qho arpeggiator ntaus cov notes ntawm ib qho chord ib qho zuj zus raws sequence. "Up" mus qis mus siab, tsim energy nce. "Down" nqis rau cascade feel. Rate tswj kev ceev (qis = ceev dua). Gate tswj seb txhua note nrov ntev npaum li cas (100% = legato, 10% = staccato). Sim rate=100ms + 4 octaves + up pattern rau classic trance arp!
hmong.sing_speak_or_play_an_instrument_hear_: Hu nkauj, hais lus, lossis ntaus ib qho cuab yeej — mloog cov effects real-time!
hmong.monitor_hear_yourself_use_headphones: 🔊 Monitor (mloog koj tus kheej — siv headphones!)
hmong.how_effects_change_sound_waves: 🔬 Effects Hloov Sound Waves Li Cas
hmong.removes_frequencies_above_lowpass_or_b: Tshem cov frequencies saum (lowpass) lossis hauv qab (highpass) ib qho threshold. Zoo li tso koj txhais tes rau ntawm koj lub qhov ncauj — tshem cov frequencies siab, ua rau lub suab "tsaus" dua.
hmong.creates_echoes_by_copying_the_signal_a: Tsim echoes los ntawm kev luam signal thiab ntaus rov qab tom qab ib pliag luv. Feedback tswj seb pes tsawg echoes rov qab.
hmong.simulates_room_acoustics_by_creating_t: Ua raws li acoustics ntawm ib chav los ntawm kev tsim ntau txhiab echoes me me uas sib xyaw. Chav me = reverb luv, cathedral = reverb ntev.
hmong.clips_the_waveform_peaks_turning_smoot: Txiav cov waveform peaks, ua kom cov sine waves du hloov mus ua cov shapes ntxaug, txha. Qhov no ntxiv harmonics tshiab uas tsis muaj hauv thawj lub suab.
hmong.duplicates_the_signal_with_a_slight_co: Luam signal ob zaug nrog ib qho delay me me uas hloov tas li. Qhov no ua raws li ntau voices/cuab yeej ntaus ua ke me ntsis tsis sib xws.
hmong.rapidly_varies_the_volume_up_and_down_: Hloov volume nce thiab nqis sai sai, tsim ib qho pulsating effect. Feem ntau hauv surf guitar thiab organ music.
hmong.use_headphones_when_monitoring_to_avoi: Siv headphones thaum monitoring kom tsis txhob muaj feedback loops! Lub mic mus hla txhua cov effects saum toj (filter, delay, reverb, thiab lwm yam) — hloov lawv kom mloog seb txhua qho hloov koj lub suab lossis cuab yeej li cas.
hmong.connect_your_microphone_to_run_your_vo: Txuas koj lub microphone kom khiav koj lub suab lossis cuab yeej hla effects chain real-time.
hmong.see_your_voice_as_a_waveform_frequency: Saib koj lub suab ua waveform + frequency spectrum. Mloog seb filter, delay, reverb, distortion, thiab chorus hloov sound waves li cas.
hmong.touch_drag_x_pitch_y_filter_effect: Kov thiab rub — X = pitch, Y = filter/effect
hmong.the_xy_pad_maps_your_finger_mouse_posi: XY pad maps koj tus ntiv tes/mouse txoj hauj lwm rau musical parameters real-time. X axis tswj pitch (sab laug = qis, sab xis = siab). Y axis tswj filter cutoff frequency (saum = bright, hauv qab = dark). Qhov no zoo li cov cuab yeej li Korg Kaoss Pad, uas hloov live electronic music performance los ntawm kev hloov 2D gestures ua suab.
hmong.xy_performance_pad_left_right_is_pitch: XY performance pad. Sab laug–sab xis yog pitch, saum–hauv qab yog filter brightness. Siv arrow keys los txav thiab ntaus ib note; nias Escape lossis Space kom nres.
hmong.sequencer_drum_pads_notation_samples_m: Sequencer, drum pads, notation, samples & ntau ntxiv →
hmong.click_cells_to_place_notes_visual_melo: Nias cov cells los tso notes — visual melody editor
hmong.the_science_of_chord_progressions: 🔬 Kev Tshawb Fawb ntawm Chord Progressions
hmong.chord_progressions_create_emotional_jo: Chord progressions tsim cov emotional journeys. Lub I chord (tonic) zoo li 'tsev.' Lub V chord (dominant) tsim tension uas xav rov qab mus rau I. Lub vi chord (relative minor) ntxiv kev tu siab lossis tob. Lub IV chord (subdominant) txav ntawm tsev maj mam. Kwv yees tias I-V-vi-IV progression tshwm hauv ntau tshaj 70% ntawm pop songs vim nws balances cov kev xav no zoo heev.
hmong.roman_numerals_i_ii_iii_iv_v_vi_vii_re: Roman numerals (I, ii, iii, IV, V, vi, vii°) sawv cev rau scale degrees. Tus loj = major chord. Tus me = minor chord.

hmong.no_saved_beats_yet_create_a_pattern_an: Tsis tau muaj saved beats. Tsim ib pattern thiab nias Save!
hmong.harmonypad_creates_warm_pure_tones_by_: HarmonyPad tsim cov suab sov, ntshiab los ntawm kev sib xyaw sine thiab triangle waves. Xaiv ib voice, xaiv ib chord ntawm grid hauv qab, ces strum daim plate!

hmong.this_is_how_different_instruments_get_: Nov yog li cas cov cuab yeej sib txawv thiaj tau lawv lub suab tshwj xeeb! Flute yeej yog harmonic 1 xwb (sine). Clarinet muaj odd harmonics (1,3,5,7). Violin muaj txhua harmonics. Nias kom tsim koj tus kheej timbre!
hmong.karplus_strong_synthesis_creates_reali: Karplus-Strong synthesis tsim cov realistic plucked string sounds siv ib qho noise burst luv uas xa mus rau ib delay line nrog filtered feedback. Hloov brightness (initial noise color) thiab damping (sustain length) kom hloov lub cwj pwm ntawm string.

hmong.adjust_fundamental_mid_and_high_harmon: Hloov fundamental, mid, thiab high harmonic levels. Widget classifies ib qho ntawm tsib discrete timbres. Tsis muaj score, tsis muaj reveal — sweep thiab saib.
hmong.hypothesis_free_text_which_harmonic_le: Hypothesis (free text): Qhov harmonic level twg txiav txim rau "bright" vs "warm"?
